name: Pan Fried Trout
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the trout under cold running water and pat dry.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Melt the butter in a large heavy skillet on medium-high heat.
4. Coat the trout in corn meal and shake off the excess.
5. When the butter is melted, place the coated trout flesh side down in the skillet.
6. Fry for 4-5 minutes, then turn and fry another 4-5 minutes or until the flesh is golden brown and flaky.
7. (Optional) Season with garlic or onion powder before frying if desired.
